key_themes: Deutsche Bank upgrade to Buy with €5 price target
Shift toward higher-margin Medtech and Pharma growth
Strong 2025 results with continued organic momentum into 2026
summary: Uniphar PLC (UPR.L / UPR.IR), a healthcare services and pharmaceutical distribution company, is seeing positive financial sentiment driven by Deutsche Bank's recent upgrade to "Buy" (from Hold) with a €5 target price, citing the market's under-appreciation of its shift to higher-growth, higher-margin Medtech and Pharma segments versus its defensive supply chain business. The company exited 2025 with strong trading momentum and expects continued organic gross profit growth, supported by strategic moves like clinical services expansion. Shares have performed well (up ~2% recently, +19% YTD), with analyst targets implying 20%+ upside, though retail social media and investor forum discussion remains sparse.
sources: 10+ web news and RNS items (Yahoo Finance, Investing.com, LSE, company site), X keyword and semantic searches (very low relevant volume; <5 investor-focused posts found), Forum mentions (ADVFN, Investing.com commentary sections)
